data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0, temp store): comment "AAAA"; overwrite the event file body to "BBBB" (same byte length) -> show still returns "AAAA" until another event lands.

Source: ticket_reducer/_cache.py:38-57 compute_dir_hash = filename + size (+ .archived marker) only; no mtime/content component. The docstring even advertises detecting "same filename, different size" — same-size rewrites are invisible by design.

Impact: git checkout/rebase of the tickets branch, fsck-recover cherry-picks, or any in-place rewrite of equal length serves stale reads. Fix: include st_mtime_ns (cheap stat already done) or a content hash in the dir hash. RED test: same-size overwrite -> fresh state.
data.title: Reducer cache serves stale state after same-size in-place event rewrite
